[1x] Common Apple (Malus pumila) @ 3770 S State St

Big old crabapple with large fruits, bent over but still fruiting. Many ripe fruits noticed 9/28/13. Enter at south end of Eddy St. When trail ends in t-intersection turn left, tree is just a few dozen feet ahead. Access: Public.
